title: should show success notification when Refresh License Limits is clicked
verifies: clicking Refresh License Limits triggers a successful API call and displays a positive Quasar notification

title: should not show Refresh License Limits button when no license is installed
verifies: the Refresh License Limits button is not rendered in the no-license state

title: should show error notification when Refresh License Limits API fails
verifies: a 403 API response from POST /api/license/refresh surfaces as a negative Quasar notification

title: should render Refresh License Limits as the third button in the active-license row
verifies: the three license-action buttons are in the correct DOM order

title: should show usage report banner only when elapsed time exceeds 6 hours
verifies: the UsageReportBanner threshold is 6 hours (hidden at 5h, visible at 7h)
